title: AI Resume Analyzer
description: AI-powered Resume Analyzer built with React and Puter.js. Features a high-end Neon UI, real-time PDF parsing, and ATS-compatibility scoring.

title: Advanced Image Editor
description: Developed and deployed an Advanced Image Editor using React and HTML5 Canvas with real-time filters, presets, and multi-page navigation.

title: M_Store
description: A responsive e-commerce website built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with product listing and cart functionality.

title: Image Editor
description: A web-based image editor built with JavaScript that allows users to upload and apply real-time image adjustments.

title: NotesApp
description: “Feature-rich notes app built with React, featuring sticky note UI, dark mode, and localStorage persistence.
